product: Genie Code Agent mode is now available by default for workspaces with the…
tagline: Genie Code Agent mode is now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled and HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate controls selected.
what_it_does: Genie Code Agent mode is now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled and HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate controls selected. With Agent mode, Genie Code can automate multiple steps from a single prompt, including retrieving relevant assets, generating and running code, fixing errors automatically, and visualizing results. note Starting July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products are billed following a pay as you go pricing model that includes a per user free monthly allowance.
why_it_matters: Account admins can manage budgets and cost controls for Genie.
